message:
test(extensions): update test suite and benchmarks for native runtime migration

Update all extension-related tests and benchmarks to align with the
QuickJS → native-rust runtime migration:

API signature updates:
- Wrap context payloads in Arc::new() for the new runtime command channel
  signature across tool_call, execute_command, and execute_shortcut calls
- Update type imports from JsExtensionRuntimeHandle to
  ExtensionRuntimeHandle throughout test harnesses

Conformance manifest (VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json):
- Add entries for newly validated extensions in the conformance corpus
- Update existing entries with refined classification metadata
- Expand vendored coverage with notes for non-extension packages

Test files updated (12):
- tests/e2e_extension_lifecycle_perf.rs
- tests/event_loop_conformance.rs
- tests/ext_conformance_artifacts.rs
- tests/ext_conformance_negative.rs
- tests/ext_conformance_scenarios.rs
- tests/ext_conformance_shapes.rs
- tests/extensions_concurrent_correctness.rs
- tests/extensions_event_wiring.rs
- tests/extensions_policy_negative.rs
- tests/extensions_reliability.rs
- tests/lab_runtime_extensions.rs
- tests/perf_bench_harness.rs
- benches/extensions.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
